step3a_omitted_methods: NONE material. All 9 audit scripts, setup reports 00-04, families A-H, PC, E2E, VERDICT, and the prior qualitative audit are represented. No method on a newer/owning branch was skipped — the di_mino audit is self-contained on research/di-mino-301-exact-audit and its parent-branch prior audit is captured as DIMINO-PRIOR-QUALITATIVE-AUDIT.
step3b_duplicates_false_novelty: NO material duplicate. Family B is split into 3 instances (root-search-null / L_fake-canary / gloss-feature) from one script — genuinely distinct techniques, not parameter-tweak-as-new-method; acceptable.

The qualitative/mechanical pair is CORRECTLY de-duplicated: DIMINO-PRIOR-QUALITATIVE-AUDIT is marked SUPERSEDED / NO_VERDICT_RECORDED and is NOT counted as a positive/negative result alongside DIMINO-VERDICT. This is the exact double-count risk the task warns about, handled correctly.

DIMINO-PC-CONTROLS (calibration battery) and DIMINO-B-LFAKE-CANARY (null-floor canary) are counted as method instances but are labeled calibration/L0-L5 and are NOT counted as LA-decipherment successes — no false novelty.

H7-H12 SOURCE_BLOCKED correctly stated as 'not a refutation, not collapsed into core' in F/G/H rows. CORRECT.

REJECT correctly scoped to the CHAIN (*301=/na/->N-W-Y->dwell->Semitic); does NOT touch the i-*301 structural core (Davis/Thomas) or claim universal etymological impossibility. CORRECT in VERDICT row + FINAL verdict.
NO_POWER (D-LOSO, B-LFAKE, H6) correctly stated as absence of discriminating power, not as a negative result. CORRECT.
H4 PARTIAL_SUPPORT correctly localized to L3 functional = the mainstream reading, explicitly NOT Di Mino's phonetic novelty; no transfer licence. CORRECT.
PC PASS correctly used to license the null-indistinguishability as a GENUINE NEGATIVE (not a dead detector). CORRECT.

NUANCE (not an error): DIMINO-E2E-NULL headlines end-to-end FP=1.0 (the pre-registered PRIMARY free-target best-of-search metric). The same artifact also reports a conservative-dwell FP of 0.75 and a PC-calibrated value-graduation-gate FP of 0.0. Headlining 1.0 matches the frozen prereg and the FINAL verdict, and P1's power field flags that the value channel HAS power (PC3 1/113) while /na/ fails the rank-1 clause — so the framing is internally consistent, but the coexistence of 1.0 / 0.75 / 0.0 in one block should be legible to avoid a reader over-reading '1.0' as the gate FP.

NUANCE (not an error): DIMINO-PC-CONTROLS scientific_outcome=SUPPORTED could be skim-misread as 'a Di Mino sub-claim supported'; it is pipeline-calibration SUPPORTED and is clearly labeled L0/calibration. No LA reading is elevated.
overall_assessment: P1's di_mino inventory is ACCURATE and NON-INFLATIONARY. All 22 rows verified against the actual artifacts; every load-bearing number reproduces from the committed JSON/reports; all four verdict-semantics traps (NO_POWER-as-refutation, SOURCE_BLOCKED-as-negative, unscoped-REJECT, qualitative+mechanical double-count) are handled correctly. No MATERIAL_ERROR, no UNSUPPORTED, no MISSING_ARTIFACT, no WRONG_LINEAGE, no STALE_STATUS, no omitted method. The only items are (1) a minor REPORT_ONLY->VERIFIED upgrade available for the prior-qualitative row's file-existence, (2) an unpopulated primary_metric_value column, and (3) two framing nuances (E2E FP 1.0-vs-0.0/0.75; PC SUPPORTED=calibration) that are already correctly caveated in the row text. P1 did not rubber-stamp anything into a false positive; the di_mino campaign itself is a REJECT, and P1 records it as such at the correct layers.
